mapper.sql: select license_id, certificate_id, material_id, supplier_id, hospital_id, hospital_code, license_kind_code, license_kind_name, license_title, license_no, issuing_body_snap, issue_date, expire_date, product_name_snap, manufacturer_name_snap, supplier_company_name_snap, register_no_snap, certificate_file, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from scm_product_cert_license_snap
mapper.select: where certificate_id = #{certificateId} and del_flag = '0' order by create_time desc, license_id
where certificate_id = #{certificateId} and license_kind_code = #{licenseKindCode} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into scm_product_cert_license_snap( license_id, certificate_id, material_id, supplier_id, hospital_id, hospital_code, license_kind_code, license_kind_name, license_title, license_no, issuing_body_snap, issue_date, expire_date, product_name_snap, manufacturer_name_snap, supplier_company_name_snap, register_no_snap, certificate_file, del_flag, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{licenseId}, #{certificateId}, #{materialId}, #{supplierId}, #{hospitalId}, #{hospitalCode}, #{licenseKindCode}, #{licenseKindName}, #{licenseTitle}, #{licenseNo}, #{issuingBodySnap}, #{issueDate}, #{expireDate}, #{productNameSnap}, #{manufacturerNameSnap}, #{supplierCompanyNameSnap}, #{registerNoSnap}, #{certificateFile}, '0', #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update scm_product_cert_license_snap
license_kind_code = #{licenseKindCode}, license_kind_name = #{licenseKindName}, license_title = #{licenseTitle}, license_no = #{licenseNo}, issuing_body_snap = #{issuingBodySnap}, issue_date = #{issueDate}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, certificate_file = #{certificateFile}, remark = #{remark}, product_name_snap = #{productNameSnap}, manufacturer_name_snap = #{manufacturerNameSnap}, supplier_company_name_snap = #{supplierCompanyNameSnap}, register_no_snap = #{registerNoSnap}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
where license_id = #{licenseId} and del_flag = '0'
update scm_product_cert_license_snap set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where license_id = #{licenseId} and del_flag = '0'
